items.summary: Removed reviewer rejection as a terminal outcome, limited review terminal states to frozen, frozen_with_conditions, resume_required, and blocked, and reclassified pushback as a pre-review ambiguity exit with a disjoint trigger and artifact path.

Rewrote arbitration to use only source-backed semantics: minor or suggestion disagreements only, leader decides, no override of reject or blocking/major issues, and closeout only as frozen_with_conditions with runtime-contract-governed evidence.
Changed cross-round tracking from conceptual-group-only handling to stable per-finding finding_id handling, while retaining conceptual_group_id strictly for grouping and severity.
Added an explicit producing path for decision-log preservation before append and paired it with an explicit prior-board-summary snapshot path in the run directory.

Made Step 1 failure routing mechanical by sending schema, source-ref, roster, and governance-file validation failures directly to blocked, while routing structurally valid but semantically insufficient inputs to pre-review pushback.
